rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Distribution Of Surplus Funds To Chase Bank U.S.A.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 04, 2016, line 1. CLAIMANT CHASE BANK USA, N.A., F/K/A CHASE MANHATTAN BANK's Motion For Distribution Of Surplus Funds To Chase Bank U.S.A. continued to April 28, 2016. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of its claim and motion. Additionally, the clerk of the Court will set the claims of Franchise Tax Board and Angel Cruz for hearing for April 28, 2016. Any opposition to the claims must be filed and served no later than April 19, 2016. Reply, if any, shall be filed and served no later than April 25, 2016. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: MARK HARPER VS. WELLS FARGO BANK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Wells Fargo'S Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 04, 2016, line 6. Wells Fargo's Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Complaint SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, because the complaint is time-barred. The three-year statute of limitations for fraud-based claims applies. Plaintiff obtained his loan in July 2008 and did not sue until July 2015. Plaintiff's opposition does not claim delayed discovery of fraud. The demurrer's other grounds are MOOT. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: THERESA LYNNE MURPHY VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 04, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON and SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING LLC's (ERRONEOUSLY SUED) DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is transferred to Dept. 302 to be heard on April 6, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA LEUNG VS. DEBRA JONES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preference In Trial Setting
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 04, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF ANDREA LEUNG's Motion For Preference In Trial Setting OFF CALENDAR, re-set for department 206. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. VS. JERRAD MOIT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Req. For Production Of Documents; Special Interrogatories; To Compel Production Of Documents And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 04, 2016, line 7. PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Special Interrogatories; To Compel Production Of Documents And Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide further complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,910. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: JENNY KIM VS. ANDERSON E JONES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 04, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT ANDERSON JONES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint filed on March 18, 2016. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ELLEN TSANG VS. DAN CHEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 04, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT DAN CHEN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff's complaint adequately pleads unlawful detainer; its attachments are part of the complaint. = (501/RBU)
